title: Razor Tyrant : the Reign of Terror
description: This mod adds a giant robot mob that follows and slaughters the players.
body:
As the summary says, this mod adds a giant robot mob that follows and slaughters the players.

 

 

 

The look of the mob:
![The look of Razor Tyrant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f5bb0d369487ed3876e3901634d69589847f718.png)

#
How the mob works in short:
#
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/cnn4W29Uslc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


How it appears?
- It spawns only nearby the players, regardless of whether it is day or night.
- SpawnRate can be configured in configs.
#
#
#
#

Moves of the mob

Slash & Chop
- Occurs when the target is in its range or collided by blocks.
  
- Wields its both arms frantically.
  
- Blades on its arms will break the obstacles.

 

Pulling Projectiles
- Shoots the green projectiles that pulls the victims to itself.

 

Leaping
- Occurs when the mob isn't in air.
  
- Uses its left leg to rush forward.
